overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in traditional Middle Eastern robes poling a wooden boat through a historic canal city resembling ancient Baghdad. The scene features mud-brick architecture, palm trees, wooden loading cranes, and clear summer lighting with high-quality game engine rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canal with high mud-brick walls and reeds

events.description: wooden bridge structure becomes visible ahead in the canal

agents.ego_description: standing on wooden boat poling steadily through narrow canal with stone walls on both sides

notable_agents.action: two figures seated on stone stairs beside the canal

entered.detail: tall weathered mud-brick wall with decorative lattice patterns near the top
tall mud-brick wall with stone foundation and stairs leading up
tall date palms visible above the walls in the distance
stone steps leading up from the waterline to the building entrance
tall green reeds growing along the canal edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow canal enclosed by high mud-brick walls. The character poles a wooden boat forward through murky green water, passing vegetation and stone stairs where figures sit. Palm trees are visible above the walls, and a wooden bridge appears in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterway passing under wooden bridge with market buildings

events.description: passing under wooden bridge structure with beams overhead

agents.ego_description: poling boat through wider waterway with buildings and awnings on both sides

notable_agents.action: person poling a small cargo boat loaded with goods passing by on the left

entered.detail: rustic wooden bridge with support beams spanning the canal
multi-story mud-brick building with wooden balconies
weathered building with small windows and wooden shutters
green fabric canopy extending over the water from the building

segments.scene_description: The boat passes under a wooden bridge into a more open waterway lined with mud-brick buildings. A fabric awning extends over the water on the left, and another cargo boat passes by. The high walls give way to buildings with balconies as the canal widens.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial canal with wooden loading cranes and cargo operations

events.description: passing under large wooden crane structure with hanging cargo platform overhead

agents.ego_description: navigating through busy industrial canal section with loading equipment and moored vessels

notable_agents.action: worker standing on a moored boat near the shore handling cargo

entered.detail: large wooden loading cranes with counterweights and pulley systems
wooden platform suspended by ropes for loading goods
wooden cargo boats tied along the bank
stone and rubble shoreline replacing the smooth walls

segments.scene_description: The canal opens into an industrial zone with large wooden cranes used for loading cargo. The boat passes under a suspended platform hanging from the crane structure. The shoreline becomes rocky and irregular, with several moored cargo boats and workers visible along the banks.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow canal approaching stone arch bridge with clear water

events.description: entering shadow beneath stone arch bridge
exiting stone bridge back into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: poling through shallow clear water toward and under the stone arch bridge

notable_agents.action: person standing in shallow water near the rocky bank

entered.detail: large stone bridge with single arch spanning the canal
transparent greenish water revealing the canal bottom

segments.scene_description: The water becomes clear and shallow as the boat approaches a large stone arch bridge. The character poles through the shadow of the bridge briefly before emerging back into sunlight. Rocky banks and palm trees line this final section of the canal.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow urban canal that gradually expands into a bustling industrial waterway and finally opens toward a sunlit stone bridge. It begins within a confined passage enclosed by high mud-brick walls and murky green water, moving past stone stairs and figures beneath towering palm trees. As the boat passes under a wooden bridge, the environment opens into a wider waterway lined with balconied buildings and fabric awnings, where another cargo boat glides by. The scene then shifts into an industrial zone characterized by large wooden loading cranes and suspended platforms, with the shoreline becoming rocky and crowded with moored vessels and workers. Finally, the water clears and shallows as the boat glides through the brief shadow of a large stone arch bridge before emerging back into the bright sunlight of a palm-lined bank.
